plugins.name: Networking Audit Skill
plugins.description: Comprehensive Azure networking security and architecture audits against ALZ and WAF standards. Covers 8 domains: NSG/Firewall, VNet Topology, Load Balancing, DNS and Private Endpoints, PaaS Networking, DNS Strategy, Perimeter Security, and Network Management. 130+ automated checks with remediation commands.
plugins.author: rofangaci
